---
title: "Test our prediction API"
format: html
echo: false
---

## Project Overview

This API serves as the live inference engine for a quantitative trading model deployed on the **Kalshi** prediction market. 

The underlying LightGBM regressor evaluates panel data across binary event tickers (e.g., economics, politics, pop culture). It leverages time-series features—most notably price momentum and **order flow imbalance** (the normalized delta between executed *Yes* and *No* contract volumes)—to predict short-term directional returns.

Instead of raw price targets, the model outputs an L1-normalized continuous signal. This transforms the predictions into a strict capital allocation vector, dictating exactly what percentage of a fixed portfolio should be deployed to each contract on a daily basis.

We can query our deployed model through the API below.

## Example prediction

```{ojs}
apiRoot = "[https://kalshi-predictor.lab.sspcloud.fr](https://kalshi-predictor.lab.sspcloud.fr)"
predictionUrl = `${apiRoot}/predict/example`
